message:
test(blob-leases): 43 unit tests + fix deadlock in lease_by_content (wa-449wj)

Added comprehensive tests for all 8 modules of the blob-leases crate
which previously had zero tests:
- content_id: 9 tests (determinism, display, hash key usage)
- lease_id: 6 tests (uniqueness, pid capture, formatting)
- error: 6 tests (all error variant display messages)
- storage: 7 tests (register/get/clear lifecycle, in-memory roundtrip)
- simple_tempdir: 15 tests (store/get, dedup, seek, refcount, edge cases)

Bug fix: removed deadlock in SimpleTempDir::lease_by_content which held
self.refs.lock() then called self.add_ref() which re-locks the same mutex.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
